ai_summaries_select_via_parent.name: ai_summaries_select_via_parent
ai_summaries_select_via_parent.using:
exists (
          select 1 from public.notes n
          where n.id = ai_summaries.note_id
            and n.deleted_at is null
            and public.is_org_member(n.org_id)
            and (
              n.visibility in ('org', 'public_in_org')
              or n.author_id = auth.uid()
              or exists (
                select 1 from public.note_shares s
                where s.note_id = n.id and s.user_id = auth.uid()
              )
            )
        )

ai_summaries_insert_via_parent.name: ai_summaries_insert_via_parent
ai_summaries_insert_via_parent.withCheck:
author_id = auth.uid()
        and exists (
          select 1 from public.notes n
          where n.id = ai_summaries.note_id
            and n.deleted_at is null
            and (
              n.author_id = auth.uid()
              or public.org_role(n.org_id) in ('owner', 'admin')
              or exists (
                select 1 from public.note_shares s
                where s.note_id = n.id
                  and s.user_id = auth.uid()
                  and s.permission in ('edit', 'comment')
              )
            )
        )

        )

author_id = auth.uid()
        or exists (

          where n.id = ai_summaries.note_id
            and n.deleted_at is null
            and public.org_role(n.org_id) in ('owner', 'admin')
        )

audit_logs_insert_self.name: audit_logs_insert_self
audit_logs_insert_self.withCheck:
actor_id = auth.uid()
        and (
          org_id is null
          or public.is_org_member(org_id)
        )

notes_select_member.name: notes_select_member
notes_select_member.using:
public.is_org_member(org_id)
        and deleted_at is null
        and (
          visibility in ('org', 'public_in_org')
          or author_id = auth.uid()
          or exists (
            select 1 from public.note_shares s
            where s.note_id = notes.id
              and s.user_id = auth.uid()
          )
        )

notes_insert_member.name: notes_insert_member

notes_update_editor.name: notes_update_editor
notes_update_editor.using:
public.is_org_member(org_id)
        and deleted_at is null
        and (
          author_id = auth.uid()
          or public.org_role(org_id) in ('owner', 'admin')
          or exists (
            select 1 from public.note_shares s
            where s.note_id = notes.id
              and s.user_id = auth.uid()
              and s.permission = 'edit'
          )
        )

notes_delete_admin_or_author.name: notes_delete_admin_or_author

users_select_self_or_same_org.name: users_select_self_or_same_org
users_select_self_or_same_org.using:
id = auth.uid()
        or exists (
          select 1
          from public.memberships m1
          join public.memberships m2 on m1.org_id = m2.org_id
          where m1.user_id = auth.uid()
            and m2.user_id = users.id
        )
